Health & Fitness · iPhone · iOS 17+

BreathWell

Breathe better. Feel better.

A calm, beautifully crafted breathing app with 120 guided sessions for sleep, focus, energy and stress relief.

Coming soon to the App Store Key features

Free · Pro upgrade available

About

What is BreathWell?

BreathWell is a premium breathing companion designed around one idea: a few minutes of intentional breathing can change the rest of your day. No streak guilt, no noisy gamification — just a quiet, Japandi-inspired space to slow down.

Choose from six pathways — calm, sleep, focus, energy, balance and recovery — each with carefully tuned breathing patterns and soft, generative ambient soundscapes. A gentle daily check-in helps the app suggest the session that fits how you actually feel.

Everything runs on your device. There is no account, no feed and nothing competing for your attention.

A closer look

Inside the app

Key features

Built around what matters

120 guided sessions

Six pathways — calm, sleep, focus, energy, balance and recovery — each with sessions tuned to a specific moment of your day.

Emotion check-in

Tell BreathWell how you feel and it recommends the right session for that moment, aware of the time of day.

Ambient soundscapes

Soft, procedurally generated nature audio accompanies every session — never looping, never distracting.

Gentle progress

A calm view of your practice over time. Streaks without guilt, reminders without pressure.

Designed for calm

A warm, Japandi-inspired interface with serif typography and six unique breathing visuals.

Completely private

No account, no analytics, no ads. Your check-ins and progress never leave your iPhone.

Who it’s for

Made for people like you

  • People who want to manage everyday stress without another noisy productivity app
  • Anyone struggling to wind down before sleep
  • Focus seekers who use breathwork before deep work or workouts
  • Meditation-curious users who find full meditation apps overwhelming

BreathWell is almost here

Currently in final testing. Want to know the moment it launches? Drop us a line.

Notify me at launch

Privacy

How BreathWell treats your data

No data collected. No ads, no analytics, no account — everything stays on your device.

Data collection

BreathWell collects no personal data. Your check-ins, favorites and practice history are stored only on your device.

Advertising

BreathWell contains no advertising of any kind.

Analytics

No analytics or tracking SDKs are included. We cannot see how you use the app.

Accounts

No account or sign-up is required — the app works fully without one.

Storage

All data is stored locally on your iPhone. Deleting the app deletes your data.

Privacy questions

Email support@amsterdamfuturelabs.com — or read the full privacy policy for BreathWell.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Is BreathWell free?

BreathWell is free to download and includes free sessions in every category. BreathWell Pro unlocks the full catalog of 120 sessions, available as a monthly or yearly subscription or a one-time lifetime purchase.

Does BreathWell work offline?

Yes — completely. Sessions, soundscapes and progress all work without an internet connection.

Is my data stored or shared?

Your data never leaves your device. BreathWell has no servers, no analytics and no tracking.

Are there ads?

No. BreathWell is and will remain entirely ad-free.

Do I need an account?

No account is needed. Open the app and start breathing.

Which devices are supported?

BreathWell is designed for iPhone and requires iOS 17 or later.

How do I get support?

Email us at support@amsterdamfuturelabs.com — we read every message and aim to reply within two business days.

Support

Need a hand with BreathWell?

Questions, bug reports, feature ideas — we read everything and aim to reply within two business days.
